title: andropogon exaratus
intro: Andropogon exaratus, also known as African foxtail grass, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Andropogon exaratus are believed to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Andropogon exaratus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
